description_long: This object is a yellow metal guard rail commonly used in urban environments to control pedestrian or vehicular movement. It features a horizontal top rail supported by evenly spaced vertical bars, all constructed from round tubular metal. The base consists of two flat, outward-extending feet for stability, allowing the rail to stand freely on flat surfaces such as sidewalks or roads. The ends of the rail are smoothly curved, minimizing sharp edges and enhancing safety. The entire structure is coated in a uniform yellow finish, which increases visibility and signals caution. There are no visible reflective markings or additional attachments on the rail.
description: A yellow metal guard rail with vertical bars and flat feet, designed for crowd or traffic control. The structure is sturdy, highly visible, and features smoothly curved ends.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the guard rail, with all vertical bars and both curved ends visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile, highlighting the thickness of the rail and the flat base foot.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the vertical bars and curved ends.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and flat base foot.
